content: Is there any other debuff that can't be dispelled by this WoD besides Sacrfice.. AND WHY THE HELL SAC ISNT COUNT AS DEBUFF
Just Sacrifice, as far as why idk, they wanted sac to be strong and way overtuned it and overbuffed dmg in general
Perma HP reduction from sin mark debuff from Pollux's cards
Who would have thought that a DoT that cannot be cleansed + multi trigger + easy to stack was a good idea?
iirc you actually cleansed the permanent hp reduction
you're just missing the reduced hp
so instead of going from 20 sinmark from 100 hp to 80/80 hp it's become 80/100 hp without sinmark debuff
Nope
It becomes 80/80 without sin marks
did they change it to work that way
It always worked like that for traphase when pollux got released
That's why i complained a lot when he got buff
But it doesn't matter because it's gmurphy meta anyway
If they nerf gmurphy then pollux become meta because of his overtuned kit now costing almost 0 hp
I find it funny I can think of like at least three more out of balance comp that still needs to get nerfed
but gmurph sacri is too much atm it buries the other problem
They shouldn't trust stat anyway for this traphase season because it all became bias due to gmurphy steamrolling the entire season
Yeah that's the problem
if they did it like last balance patch
so many wheels needed to get nerfed
out of too many usage statistic
They buffed already broken units and won't nerf them because gmurphy just ate all the stat
emerge, greed, song, hat
I think dev just stopped trying to hotfix anything at this point
Inb4 you see traphase patch about gmurphy nerf and nobody else because... PEOPLE COULDN'T TEST STUFF SO THE DEVS COULD COLLECT DATA PROPERLY WITH THAT SHITTY GMURPHY META
last time we immediately get a balance patch after some stuff is too op
in a week or less
now it has been what
When she got released she got instant nerfed a few hour after
Then another the day after
And another 2 days later
3 nerfs patchs against her in under 3 days
They all got reverted
is draft fixed yet
It's fine to make 75% stacking sacrifice like i said, but making units that exalt really hard such as helot or hameln needed to bz nerfed
Not yet
can't even play in a mode without hameln gmurph comp lol
Because honestly if it's not 50% from base gmurphy exalt then she sucks in draft
I don't like how allpick now boils down to I get void/gun cry before they got their magic hat+taunt
or their luck so shit they can't exalt three times in a row and **JUST** exalt twice instead
to have a chance of winning
you know shits broken when my win rate vs helot+liz+gmurph turn 3 all nuke sacri is better than the shit hameln team doing
only reason is because mouchette is like a small bandage in the giant leaking hole to combat instant wipe team
who else can come back from 70 sacri 1v4
none
Alva
Kill gmurphy to stop sacrifice stacking
Then you're good
imagine getting expensive 5 cost wheel before it happen first
Or kill aigis too if they use her
it happened before my arith limit even hit 6
That's the problem, yeah and it's the reason i'm also pissed off, they nerf alva but allow AoE one shot turn 3 shit

Salvador Posse also needs a nerf but will probably fly under the radar.

Insta kill Lily is back and more annoying then ever :(, at least it used to kill Lily before
it actually still kills her
if she's at the amount of hp where it didnt kill her then the damage was not that big anyway
I can think of several ways to negate the effect too since it announces "I'm here, I'm gonna buff next turn."
I can faint/dispel or even swap out their wheel with gun cry
more ways to dealt instead of watching getting gmurph-ed
It has counter play yes, but it’s still just too much in one card
the fact that it has many counter play is why it's strong to beginwith
not unlike the current meta where it's too strong and the only counterplay don't work 70% of the time

Yeah…. This patch is awful.
The Faros Salvador meta a couple patches ago was bad, but trying to play off meta into sacrifice feels awful
you can't even void posse/gun cry when it mattered
cause they taunt
the only real counter is pulling the same shit
making the match feels stale and one note
